---
title: "07 GenotypeGVCFs"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Run GATK `GenotypeGVCFs` on each GenomicsDB workspace to produce interval VCFs.

# Inputs

- Manifest:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/genotype_5mb_manifest.tsv`
- Reference FASTA:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/2.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/sorghum_v5.1.fa`

# Outputs

- Interval VCFs under:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/vcfs/`

# Script

- `scripts/07_genotype_gvcfs/genotype_from_gdb_array.sbatch`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb
sbatch --array=1-149 genotype_vcfs/scripts/genotype_from_gdb_array.sbatch
```
